title: Huemn's Optimized PvP ModPack
description: A modpack optimized for pvp needs
body:
This modpack is designed to deliver a streamlined, high-performance made specifically for competitive Minecraft PvP. Built around carefully selected optimization and performance-enhancing mods, it focuses on maximizing fps, reducing latency, and delivering smooth gameplay during combat scenarios.

The pack is intentionally minimalistic, prioritizing raw performance over visual while also delivering quality-of-life additions. Players are encouraged to add their own preferred cosmetic or utility mods on top of this optimized base.
